findings.title: False positive: no cryptography present (substring match on "des")
findings.description: L6/52 were flagged for a weak cipher; they are the `describedBy?: string` prop (L6) and `aria-describedby={props.describedBy}` (L52) — a substring match on 'des' in 'describedBy'. No crypto/cipher/random/hash exists in the file. `describedBy` flows only into the aria-describedby attribute, which the JSX runtime escapes via escapeAttribute, so no attribute injection. The only text interpolation is `{props.children}` (the framework's intended raw-HTML composition slot). Not a vulnerability.
findings.recommendation: No action required. Suppress the substring crypto rule.
